summary: CVE Monitor Dashboard fully tested - Backend 100% (25/25 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all 4 tabs working, CRUD operations verified). All 13 API endpoints verified, UI navigation and interactions working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend service properly excludes MongoDB _id from all responses
All severity levels (critical, high, medium, low, info) properly mapped from NVD CVSS data
NVD API integration uses real https://services.nvd.nist.gov/rest/json/cves/2.0 endpoint
Watch rules support keyword, package, and vendor types with severity filtering
Alerts system properly tracks new/acknowledged/dismissed statuses
Frontend properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
CVE Monitor link correctly placed in Security dropdown navigation
7-day trend chart and severity breakdown visualizations working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test watches via pytest and Playwright tests (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CVE Monitor Dashboard fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/cve-monitor/health, GET /api/cve-monitor/stats, GET /api/cve-monitor/feed, POST /api/cve-monitor/feed/refresh, POST/GET /api/cve-monitor/watches, PUT /api/cve-monitor/watches/{id}/toggle, DELETE /api/cve-monitor/watches/{id}, POST /api/cve-monitor/watches/{id}/refresh, GET /api/cve-monitor/alerts, PUT /api/cve-monitor/alerts/{id}/acknowledge, PUT /api/cve-monitor/alerts/{id}/dismiss, POST /api/cve-monitor/alerts/acknowledge-all. Frontend: CVEMonitorDashboard.jsx with 4 tabs (Overview, CVE Feed, Watch Rules, Alerts). Navigation via Security dropdown. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!. Uses real NVD API - no mocked data.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/cve-monitor/stats: PASS - Returns total_feed_entries, watches, alerts, severity_breakdown, daily_trend
backend_endpoints.GET /api/cve-monitor/feed: PASS - Returns cached CVE entries with search and severity filter support
backend_endpoints.POST /api/cve-monitor/feed/refresh: PASS - Fetches fresh CVEs from NVD API
backend_endpoints.POST /api/cve-monitor/watches: PASS - Creates watch with name, keyword, type, severity_filter
backend_endpoints.POST /api/cve-monitor/watches/{id}/refre: PASS - Refreshes specific watch against NVD
backend_endpoints.GET /api/cve-monitor/alerts: PASS - Lists alerts with status and severity filter

frontend_components.CVE Monitor page at /cve-monitor: PASS - Page loads with header and description
frontend_components.Navigation link in Security dropdown: PASS - CVE Monitor link visible and clickable
frontend_components.4 tabs (Overview, CVE Feed, Watch Rules,: PASS - All tabs visible and switchable
frontend_components.Overview tab - stat cards: PASS - Shows Feed Entries (81), Active Watches (1), Total Alerts (37), New Alerts (0)
frontend_components.Overview tab - severity breakdown: PASS - Shows Critical (8), High (27), Medium (40), Low (6), Info (0)
frontend_components.Overview tab - 7-day trend: PASS - Bar chart with daily CVE counts
frontend_components.CVE Feed tab - search input: PASS - Filters by CVE ID or description
frontend_components.CVE Feed tab - expandable items: PASS - Shows description, CWE IDs, affected products, references
frontend_components.Watch Rules tab - add watch button: PASS - Opens form with name, keyword, type, severity inputs
frontend_components.Watch Rules tab - watch list: PASS - Shows watches with toggle, refresh, delete buttons
frontend_components.Watch Rules tab - refresh watch: PASS - Triggers NVD API refresh for specific keyword
frontend_components.Alerts tab - alert list: PASS - Shows CVE ID, severity badge, CVSS score, description
frontend_components.Alerts tab - acknowledge button: PASS - Changes alert status to acknowledged
frontend_components.Alerts tab - dismiss button: PASS - Changes alert status to dismissed

design_verification.Severity colors: PASS - Critical (red), High (orange), Medium (amber), Low (blue), Info (slate)
design_verification.Text contrast: PASS - Good contrast on all text elements
design_verification.Responsive layout: PASS - Cards grid adapts to screen size

mocked_data_note: No mocked APIs - all CVE data fetched from real NVD API (https://services.nvd.nist.gov/rest/json/cves/2.0)
